headline: AMSF Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Higher Costs, Soft Underwriting
summary: AMERISAFE Q1 earnings miss estimates as higher expenses and weaker underwriting margins weigh, despite solid premium growth and rising revenues.

headline: W.R. Berkley's Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Miss
summary: WRB posts mixed Q1 results with revenue growth and higher investment income, but misses estimates as premiums come in slightly below expectations.

headline: CB Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat on Higher Underwriting Profit
summary: Chubb Limited's Q1 results reflect strong growth in P&C underwriting income, investment income, life income and improved combined ratio.
